MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Richard Hulburt for plaintiff and moving party: Janice Cason

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Janice Cason's motion to compel responses to discovery and attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection to form and special interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant is ordered to contact counsel for plaintiff to schedule his deposition. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
